name: edge-debug-port
description: Permanently configure Microsoft Edge to launch with --remote-debugging-port=9222 across all entry points (taskbar, Start Menu, Quick Launch shortcuts + MSEdgeHTM/MSEdgeMHT/MSEdgePDF/microsoft-edge: registry handlers). Lets Playwright/Puppeteer connectOverCDP attach to user's REAL Edge profile (cookies, extensions, sessions) instead of launching empty disposable profile via chromium.launch({channel:'msedge'}). Reversible via -Revert flag with JSON backup.
